programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Help Wanted
programme.desc: Sharks, shorts and crew problems plague the fleet, but two captains get blessed with new mates while harpoon boats battle for the last fish of their season.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Snitches Get Fishes
programme.desc: Midway through the North Atlantic bluefin tuna season, a long-­-running feud lands one Gloucester captain in hot water, while another boat struggles to keep their crew intact.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Opposites Distract
programme.desc: At the halfway mark of the North Atlantic bluefin tuna season some teams are working well together and killing it while others are floundering and on the verge of killing each other.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Take It to the Bank
programme.desc: The Gloucester captains face a familiar decision: whether or not to take the long, high-¬-risk journey to Georges Bank to increase their chances of a big bluefin haul.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Doubling Down
programme.desc: After a massive haul offshore on Georges Bank last week, Captain Dave Carraro of FV-¬-Tuna.com and Captain TJ Ott of Hot Tuna decide to double down and make the long trip again.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Riders in the Storm
programme.desc: When a violent storm rolls in during week eleven, the Gloucester captains face a tough decision at a critical time: do they fish... or flee?

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Comeback Kid
programme.desc: With four weeks left in the season, Hard Merchandise and FV-¬- Tuna.Com struggle to stay at the top of the fleet as an unexpected adversary, the Wicked Pissah.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Tuna Invaders
programme.desc: With only three weeks left, the North Atlantic captains face more competition than ever as boats from all over head to Gloucester and battle for those last bluefin of the season.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: The Thin Bluefin Line
programme.desc: There is a narrow margin separating the top four boats and only two weeks left in the season.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: The Final Fishdown
programme.desc: In the last week of the Atlantic bluefin tuna season, the closest race in Wicked Tuna history is a tossup among four top contenders.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: The Bite is On
programme.desc: Meet the fleet, as peak season begins and the adrenaline rush of \\"monstah\\" hunting hits Gloucester.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Payback's a Fish
programme.desc: After going bust on his last trip and coming home empty-handed, Marciano of Hard Merchandise now wrestles with the trials of being a husband and father who has to be away from home so often.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Weekend Warriors
programme.desc: Tuna.com continues its winning streak, catching two fish in one day while the rest of the fleet struggles to even find a spot to fish in between the weekend recreational boaters.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Size Matters
programme.desc: Meet Kevin and the Christina, a boat that gets its own real-life fish story when it snags an 1,100-pound \\"monstah\\" right out of the gate.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Greed, Ego & Jealousy
programme.desc: After watching the Christina catch the biggest tuna of the season, the uber-competitive Captain Dave of the Tuna.com is obsessed with beating the record, and catching a fish bigger than 1,075 lbs!

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Mann gegen Sturm
programme.desc: Marciano, captain of Hard Merchandise, risks the elements to hook a giant bluefin and finds himself with boat trouble in the midst of the storm.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Mutiny at Sea
programme.desc: A mixture of bad luck and mutiny brews in this tumultuous episode of Wicked Tuna. Tensions erupt on New England's top tuna boat, Tuna.Com, when Captain Dave and Paul get into a heated confrontation that causes Paul to quit!

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Grudge Match
programme.desc: With just two weeks left until the end of tuna fishing season, Bounty Hunter gains a new deckhand.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Captain Ralph in Not
programme.desc: A hard season with little money to show has taken its toll on the crew of the Odysea, leading Captain Ralph to lash out at his first mate Pirate.

programme.title: Conmen Case Files: Robert Hendy-Freegard – The Terrorist Trickster
programme.desc: Dubbed “The Most Evil Conman Ever” by the British press, Hendy-Freegard terrorized victims into believing they were terrorist targets.

programme.title: Conmen Case Files: Michael Hammond – The Fantasist Con
programme.desc: He posed as a playboy, a detective, a top surgeon, millionaire property developer, royal confident and boyfriend of Renee Zellweger.

programme.title: 72 Hours: Murder on Campus
programme.desc: The bizarre murder of a world-renowned anthropologist over the Christmas holidays shocks staff and students at the university where she teaches.

programme.title: 72 Hours: The Game
programme.desc: 1995 - Houston, Texas. A lonely man calls a dating service and gets more than he bargained for when he is met at gunpoint and robbed by his “dates”. The women, dubbed “Thelma & Louise”, lure men with the promise of sex but then drug and rob them.

programme.title: 72 Hours: Cold Hit
programme.desc: In 1994, a troubled single mother is found raped and murdered in her apartment. Was it one of the volatile men in her life? All possible suspects are eliminated and the case goes cold for three years, until a nine-year old girl is brutally raped.

programme.title: 72 Hours: Faith Healer
programme.desc: A trucker at a roadside rest station discovers the fully clothed body of a dead East Indian woman.

programme.title: 72 Hours: Sweet Killer
programme.desc: An aging hippy is going through bad times. When he's found dead in his home with a gut of antifreeze, it's a closed case. Then a shocking confession reveals a maelstrom of lies and a story of cold-blooded murder.

programme.title: 72 Hours: Predator
programme.desc: The phone rings in the middle of the night. On the other end of the line, the sounds of an attack. The couple that receive the call rush to its source and discover a horrific scene.

programme.title: 72 Hours: Hate Crime
programme.desc: A young Orthodox Jewish man is in Pittsburgh to celebrate Passover with family when he is gunned down simply because of the way he is dressed.

programme.title: 72 Hours: Hunted
programme.desc: A real estate broker doesn’t return home. Her family can't find her. But police do - dead in a closet in her office. The DNA on her body is tested against 150 men. No match. The case runs cold.

programme.title: 72 Hours: Burning Obsession
programme.desc: In 1988, a promiscuous 22-year old boy from the Sikh community has one affair too many and ends up losing his life. Diligent detective work and DNA help police nail the killer who believed he had gotten away with murder.

programme.title: 72 Hours: Model Killer
programme.desc: A gorgeous young model is bludgeoned to death in her downtown apartment. The wounds to her head are so severe police initially presume she's been shot.

programme.title: 72 Hours: Bull's Eye
programme.desc: A Girl Guide leader is found dead on the floor of her bedroom. When an autopsy reveals a bullet lodged in her brain, detectives learn they’re investigating a murder.

programme.title: 72 Hours: Evil Eyes
programme.desc: A dead woman is found in a park. It’s learned the deceased is a divorced landlady of a group home for transients. The suspect list is long; the clues to follow are few.

programme.title: 72 Hours: Thrill Kill
programme.desc: When a senior citizen is killed on a city street, authorities at first treat it as a typical hit-and-run accident. But as they investigate further, they begin to realize that the culprit is a thrill-seeking psychopath.

programme.title: 72 Hours: The Hustler
programme.desc: Three people meet - the son of a wealthy Frenchman, a Vancouver businessman looking for investors. Unbeknownst to two of them, they are the latest victims of a notorious international con man.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Mysterious Disappearences in Paris - Christelle Leroy
programme.desc: On March 21th 1991, Pascale Escarfail, 19 years old, is discovered dead at her studio in the 14th arrondissement of Paris, she was raped then stabbed multiple times.
programme.sub-title: Mysterious Disappearences in Paris - Christelle Leroy

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Only DNA Can Say - Angélique Dumetz
programme.desc: On February 23th 2017, policemen are alerted of the disapearrance of Brigitte Troadec, her husband Pascal, and their children Sébastien and Charlotte.
programme.sub-title: Only DNA Can Say - Angélique Dumetz

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Murdered For a Fake Treasure - Troadec Case
programme.desc: On March 28th 2013, the burnt body of Anne Barbot, 38 years old, is discovered in a forest of Maine-et-Loire.
programme.sub-title: Murdered For a Fake Treasure - Troadec Case

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Triple Murders in Vise
programme.desc: On May 17th 2005, a body is discovered in a forest of Sucy-en-Brie; Christophe Belle, 40 years old, a renowned pastry cook.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: In Search of SK1 - Akira Ojima Case
programme.desc: On October 13th 1996, the body of young Angélique Dumetz, 18 years old, is recovered down a ditch in Oise forest. An important clue is found on the crime scene.
programme.sub-title: In Search of SK1 - Akira Ojima Case

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Deadly Trap For the Interior Designer - Guy Georges Case
programme.desc: On April 18th 2014, in Visé, Belgium, policemen are informed that gunshots had been fired on the street.
programme.sub-title: Deadly Trap For the Interior Designer - Guy Georges Case

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Françoise Desnoue Case
programme.desc: On the evening of August 30st 2013, in a small village of Bougrogne, Éric Desnoue, 52 years old, reports his wife missing to the police. Did Françoise Desnoue run away? Or did she reattempt to kill herself?

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner: The Things Men Do
programme.desc: It is 3 AM and Deputy Torres is cruising a Texas highway when he suddenly spots a crushed pick-up truck along the side of the road. Trapped inside is the lifeless body of 24-year-old Luis Reyes.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner: Who is Watching the Children?
programme.desc: An infant and his two-year-old sister are found dead in a house shared by two families. At first, they are believed to have died from either carbon monoxide poisoning or cold medicine overdoses.

programme.title: Crime Stories: The Homicidal Handyman
programme.desc: In Sacramento in the mid 1980s, a ruthless killer was making his way through the fringe community of Oak Park.

programme.title: Crime Stories: The Roaming Rapist
programme.desc: For three weeks in May of 1994, a brutal killer had a nation on edge. A bloody spree of rapes, kidnappings, and murders resulted in the deaths of six Oklahoma residents.

programme.title: Crime Stories: The Bully Kills
programme.desc: 14-year-old Reena Virk goes to a party at the Craigflower Bridge, near Victoria, Canada. It is there where her's friend's swarm, burn and beat her down.

programme.title: Crime Stories: The Backpacker Killer
programme.desc: In the early 1990s, the tourist hotspot of New South Wales, Australia became a place of fear when backpackers started going missing.

programme.title: Crime Stories: The Arbitrary Assassins
programme.desc: In November 1996, Raymond Collin went missing in his hometown of Timmins, Ontario. The discovery of his body days later in a snow-covered truck led police to an assortment of possible suspects.

programme.title: Crime Stories: The Slave Master
programme.desc: Several women went missing from the Kansas City area in the 1980s and 1990s.

programme.title: Crime Stories: The Silent Sniper
programme.desc: In March 1992 Claude Hawkins was shot dead while he was fishing in Ohio. Hawkins' murder mirrored multiple deaths in other nearby counties.

programme.title: Crime Stories: The Elusive Rapist
programme.desc: In the winter of 1968, the prairie city of Saskatoon is ravaged by a string of savage rapes.

programme.title: Crime Stories: Terror by Text
programme.desc: On a wintry morning in Sweden, Alexandra Fossmo, wife of pastor Helge Fossmo, was found shot to death in her bed.

programme.title: Crime Stories: The Human Hunter
programme.desc: Robert C. Hansen was known for his hunting abilities. In the early 1980s, however, his taste for hunting took a sinister turn.

programme.title: Crime Stories: The Menthol Murderer
programme.desc: A week-long search for a missing 10-yr-old Indiana girl ends sadly with her body being discovered in a nearby stream.

programme.title: Crime Stories: The Abducted Atheists
programme.desc: American Atheist Madalyn Murray O'Hair and her family vanished in August 1995, leaving behind an ominous note.

programme.title: Crime Stories: Ronald Glenn West: The 22 Caliber Killer
programme.desc: When two suburban housewives are killed in their homes within a week of each other in May 1970, it leaves Toronto in fear.
programme.sub-title: Ronald Glenn West: The 22 Caliber Killer

programme.title: Crime Stories: The Doctor of Death
programme.desc: When emergency services arrived at the office of respected neurologist Richard Boggs following the report of a patient's death, they had their suspicions regarding the circumstances...

programme.title: Crime Stories: Douglas Robert Worth: The Pictou Sadist
programme.desc: On December 11, 1987 a hard luck child living in a group home in Ontario was reported missing when she failed to return home from school.
programme.sub-title: Douglas Robert Worth: The Pictou Sadist

programme.title: Crime Stories: The Homocidal Drifter
programme.desc: In the city of Moncton, New Brunswick police discover the bodies of Joan Hicks and her 11-year-old daughter, Nina ‚Äì both brutally murdered late in the night.

programme.title: Crime Stories: The Roaming Rapist
programme.desc: For three weeks in May of 1994, a brutal killer had a nation on edge. A bloody spree of rapes, kidnappings, and murders resulted in the deaths of six Oklahoma residents.

programme.title: World’s Most Evil Killers: Stephen Griffiths
programme.desc: Stephen Griffiths, the self-proclaimed Crossbow Cannibal, had always fantasized about murder. In 2009, he acted on his murderous instincts and killed three women.

programme.title: World’s Most Evil Killers: Jeffrey Dahmer
programme.desc: Jeffrey Dahmer is one of the most notorious killers in the world. For thirteen years he raped, murdered and ate his young male victims — seventeen of them in total.

programme.title: Chopper Squad: Episode 2
programme.desc: A teenage motorcyclist is fighting for his life after crashing on a remote farm near Warkworth, a man has 2nd degree burns to his face and hands from an accidental explosion, and four men are missing after two boats capsized on the Kawhia bar.

programme.title: Chopper Squad: Episode 1
programme.desc: The Rescue 1 chopper team struggle to save a Paeroa farmer.

programme.title: Chopper Squad: Episode 12
programme.desc: The chopper team is called out to save a motorbike racer who's crashed at 200ks per hour and a woman scalded by an exploding radiator, plus an elderly golfer in a kilt suffers a heart attack on the 18th hole.

programme.title: Chopper Squad: Episode 10
programme.desc: The Rescue 1 team are en route to the scene of a horrific accident. A pedestrian has been hit by a truck and is in a critical condition.

programme.title: GPs: Behind Closed Doors
programme.desc: The Surgery patients are suffering with chronic pain.

programme.title: GPs: Behind Closed Doors
programme.desc: A patient enters reception with all the signs of a stroke.

programme.title: GPs: Behind Closed Doors
programme.desc: Dr Ward treats a victim of a savage gang attack.

programme.title: GPs: Behind Closed Doors: New Year, New You
programme.desc: New Year's special of the observational documentary series.

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Every Second Counts: Episode 5
programme.desc: A high call-out for ambulances has resulted in paramedics queuing with patients.

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Every Second Counts: Episode 8
programme.desc: The staff and patients of Barnsley's A&E department are put under the microscope.

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Every Second Counts: Episode 12
programme.desc: As a heatwave hits Yorkshire, the patient numbers rise with the temperature.

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Every Second Counts: Episode 7
programme.desc: In Barnsley's Casualty department, it's a battle of life and death every single day.

programme.title: Emergency Bikers: Episode 12
programme.desc: A rogue driver tries to escape the long arm of the law. Essex biker cop Mick’s got him in his sights but in a maze of roads, can he catch his prey?

programme.title: Emergency Bikers: Episode 6
programme.desc: In Portsmouth biker paramedic there’s a shocking case for Allan which will demand more than just medical know-how. And a cyclist’s memory loss is worrying in the aftermath of an accident.

programme.title: Emergency Bikers: Episode 1
programme.desc: Smashed bones on a building site, a biker doing a ton on one of the UK’s most dangerous roads, life-threatening seizures, a mystery identity to unravel and a smoker fighting for every breath.

programme.title: Emergency Bikers: Episode 7
programme.desc: The bikers are back in action with the paramedics responding to emergency calls where a child’s been knocked over outside school, and a panic attack at Birmingham Moor Street station.

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Every Second Counts: Episode 1
programme.desc: Patrick examines a man who has had a suspected heart attack.

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Every Second Counts: Episode 3
programme.desc: A man with potential spine injuries is given pain relief while waiting for scan results.

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Every Second Counts
programme.desc: The ambulances are stacking up outside as the fire alarm goes off.

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Every Second Counts: Episode 7
programme.desc: A toddler is brought in with sepsis and 84-year-old Norman has had a fall.

programme.title: Ambulance: Code Red: Episode 6
programme.desc: Paramedics perform life-saving treatment on a car driver.

programme.title: Scorpion: Cuba Libre
programme.desc: Team Scorpion heads to Cuba when a woman from Cabe's past pleads for him to help catch a Serbian war criminal.

programme.title: Scorpion: Fish Filet
programme.desc: In order to save the lives of three judges, Sylvester goes undercover in federal prison but Team Scorpion must break him out when his life is threatened. Kevin Weisman guest stars.

programme.title: Scorpion: Robots
programme.desc: Walter, Cabe, and Happy are trapped with the crew in a top-secret submarine when an explosion sends it to the bottom of the ocean with limited oxygen.

programme.title: Scorpion: Super Fun Guys
programme.desc: Team Scorpion goes undercover on the "Super Fun Guy" movie set in Kazakstan in order to disable a Soviet-era nuclear missile being sold by terrorists.

programme.title: Scorpion: Tech, Drugs, and Rock 'n Roll
programme.desc: Walter's attempt to "normalize" goes horribly wrong when a nefarious virus is uploaded to his computer.

programme.title: Scorpion: Crazy Train
programme.desc: Team Scorpion must stop a sabotaged runaway subway train with Paige and Ralph on board. Also, in his attempt to impress Happy, Toby has his first boxing match.

programme.title: Scorpion: Area 51
programme.desc: To help fund Walter's research into saving his sister's life, Team Scorpion takes a lucrative job for the CIA to find a top-secret aircraft in the mysterious Area 51.

programme.title: Scorpion: US vs. UN vs. UK
programme.desc: Team Scorpion is blackmailed to break into the United Nations to assist in the assassination of a menacing arms dealer.

programme.title: Scorpion: Arrivals And Departures
programme.desc: When Team Scorpion and Walter's parents visit Megan in the hospital as her health deteriorates, they are quarantined after a deadly fungus outbreak threatens to infect everyone.

programme.title: Scorpion: The Old College Try
programme.desc: Team Scorpion goes undercover at a university to find a hacker who infiltrates the Federal Reserve and threatens to collapse the world economy.

programme.title: Scorpion: Dam Breakthrough
programme.desc: On Christmas Eve, Team Scorpion must prevent a catastrophe when torrential rains create a large crack in a dam, threatening to wipe out an entire town in its wake.

programme.title: Scorpion: White Out
programme.desc: In order to save a United States Special Forces unit from certain death, Team Scorpion must brave the subzero temperatures of Antarctica.

programme.title: Scorpion: Sun of a Gun
programme.desc: Sylvester comes face to face with his estranged father who asks Team Scorpion for help.

programme.title: Scorpion: Da Bomb
programme.desc: Team Scorpion is helping with NASA's top secret rocket launch, but they must sabotage their own mission.

programme.title: Scorpion: Fractured
programme.desc: After a powerful earthquake rocks Los Angeles, Team Scorpion must fix a pinched gas line to prevent a massive explosion.

programme.title: Scorpion: Adaptation
programme.desc: While Team Scorpion works to stop an influx of drugs being smuggled into the country via drones, Walter gives Happy and Toby an ultimatum on their new relationship.

programme.title: Scorpion: The Fast & The Nerdiest
programme.desc: After Sylvester scores big on THE PRICE IS RIGHT, Team Scorpion must infiltrate a high-end car smuggling operation about to ship bioweapons to South America.

programme.title: Scorpion: Ticker
programme.desc: When Los Angeles' blood supply is hacked and deemed unusable because of fear it's been tainted, Team Scorpion must find the culprit.

programme.title: Scorpion: Djibouti Call
programme.desc: While on a secret mission in Djibouti, Africa, with his new Homeland protege, Tim Armstrong (Scott Porter), Cabe is captured and Team Scorpion must save him.

programme.title: Scorpion: Twist And Shout
programme.desc: Team Scorpion's mission to recover the remains of fallen Marines in Vietnam is threatened along with their lives when a deadly tornado heads directly towards them.

programme.title: Transformers: Animated: Velocity
programme.desc: The AllSpark creates a new Autobot out of pieces of garbage.

programme.title: Transformers: Animated: Rise Of The Constructicons
programme.desc: Bumblebee competes against the Decepticons in an underground racing competition.

programme.title: Transformers: Animated: A Fistful Of Energon
programme.desc: When the AllSpark turns construction vehicles into Autobots, Bulkhead becomes fast friends. However, the Decepticons have other plans in mind.

programme.title: Transformers: Animated: S.U.V.: Society Of Ultimate Villainy
programme.desc: Prowl goes after Starscream when he escapes from the custody of the Elite Guard. However, he receives competition from Lockdown when Megatron offers a bounty on Starscream.

programme.title: Transformers: Animated: Autoboot Camp
programme.desc: The second-rate villains of Detroit team up to beat the Autobots.

programme.title: Transformers: Animated: Black Friday
programme.desc: While chasing an Autobot traitor, Bumblebee thinks back on the time he spent with Bulkhead in the Autobot Boot Camp.

programme.title: Transformers: Animated: Sari, No One's Home
programme.desc: Unlikely matchups! It's Optimus Prime and Dinobot Grimlock vs. Blackarachnia and Meltdown.

programme.title: Transformers: Animated: A Bridge Too Close, Part 1
programme.desc: Sari has to defend the Autobot home base from invading Constructicons.

programme.title: Transformers: Animated: A Bridge Too Close, Part 2
programme.desc: Megatron comes up with a plan to build a space bridge to Cybertron. However, he needs to capture Bulkhead, an expert space bridge mechanic, in order to build the bridge. Megatron's ultimate goal is to take over Cybertron and eventually the universe.

programme.title: Transformers: Animated: Transwarped, Part 1
programme.desc: The Final Battle! It's Optimus Prime and the Autobots against Megatron and the Decepticons in a fate to save both Earth and Cybertron.

programme.title: Transformers: Animated: Transwarped, Part 2
programme.desc: Sari Sumdac is coping with the newly discovered fact that she's a robot. Meanwhile, the Autobots on Earth are trying to figure out a way to warn the Autobots on Cybertron about the spy working for Megatron.

programme.title: Transformers: Animated: Transwarped, Part 3
programme.desc: Things quickly descend from bad to worse for the Autobots when Detroit is menaced by new threats. Meanwhile, Ratchet remembers his first encounter with Omega Supreme and grows frustrated with his uselessness to the Autobots.

programme.title: Transformers: Animated: Three's A Crowd
programme.desc: The Autobots are given a triple blow when one of their own is critically damaged, another is overloading destructively and the third has become an assault weapon for Megatron.

programme.title: Transformers: Animated: Where Is Thy Sting?
programme.desc: Bulkhead must face off against the Constructicons and their new leader, Dirt Boss, when they decide to hold the city's oil supply hostage. Meanwhile, the other Autobots manage to capture Lugnut, but find hauling him away a more difficult task.

programme.title: Transformers: Animated: Five Servos Of Doom
programme.desc: Unaware that he is being followed by the Elite Guard, Wasp heads to Earth to take his revenge on Bumblebee.

programme.title: Transformers: Animated: Predacons Rising
programme.desc: When Sentinel Prime successfully captures fugitive Decepticons, Prowl becomes suspicious.

programme.title: Transformers: Animated: Human Error, Part 1
programme.desc: The Autobots and the Elite Guard pursue Wasp for their own agenda. However, Blackarachnia has Swoop capture Wasp in her latest attempt to rid herself of her organic half. This experiment goes awry and turns Wasp into Waspinator.

programme.title: Transformers: Animated: Human Error, Part 2
programme.desc: On Christmas Eve, Optimus Prime patrols the city in search of Soundwave. With Porter C. Powell selling Soundwave action figures, Optimus is paranoid that the real Soundwave is out there.

programme.title: Transformers: Animated: Decepticon Air
programme.desc: It turns out that Soundwave has trapped the Autobots in a virtual reality. Now, Sari must free them before Soundwave completely turns them into Decepticons.

programme.title: Transformers: Animated: This Is Why I Hate Machines
programme.desc: In an effort to speed up their return to Cybertron, Sentinel Prime has Jazz pilot the Elite Guard ship through a space storm. The storm's energies reactivate Swindle, who frees his fellow Decepticon prisoners, and the group goes on to take over the ship.
programme.sub-title: This Is Why I Hate Machines

programme.title: Transformers: Animated: Endgame, Part 1
programme.desc: A TransWarp accident with the Space Bridge sends Ratchet and Captain Fanzone to Cybertron, where Sentinel Prime has the planet on high alert. They soon end up stumbling upon a plot by Shockwave to steal Omega Supreme's Access Codes from Arcee.

programme.title: Transformers: Animated: Endgame, Part 2
programme.desc: The Autobots discover Omega Supreme's energy signal on the Moon. Rachet insists on going there right away to save him, but Prime refuses, knowing that they are too weak to fight Megatron.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: First Encounter
programme.desc: During the war on Cybertron, the Mini-Cons, mini-transformers who can be used as upgrades by their bigger brethren, crash lands on Earth. In present day, a group of children finds their ship by accident which brings the war to Earth.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Metamorphosis
programme.desc: Escaping from the confrontation between Bots and Cons, Alex, Rad and Carlos find the cargo hold of the Exodus underground and are adopted by three minicons. Retreating to the moon, the 'Cons make the wreck of the Exodus there their base.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Base
programme.desc: Alexis, Rad and Carlos introduce themselves to Optimus Prime, Hot Rod and First Aid, and get a condensed history of the conflict. Meanwhile, on the moon, Megatron plots to capture the minicons that are now appearing all over earth.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Comrade
programme.desc: The children join the Autobot team and head out on their first mission to find a newly waking minicon. The Decepticons arrive to combat them. Optimus Prime finds his old minicon partner.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Soldier
programme.desc: The next minicon alert is from Antarctica. Starscream retrieves the minicon, but has it stolen from him. Hot Shot learns a lesson in cooperation.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Jungle
programme.desc: The newest minicon activates in the middle of a forest: both sides fight for it, and the conflict sets the trees alight. The Autobots attempt to battle the blaze, while Starscream finally acquires his own minicon.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Carnival
programme.desc: Rad and Carlos smuggle their minicons out of the base to visit the town's carnival. Billy and Fred see them transform and try to capture one, but are thwarted by Hot Shot.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Palace
programme.desc: In an ancient palace deep beneath the Sahara another minicon is waking, but who will reach it first - the children or the Decepticon Demolishor?

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Confrontation
programme.desc: The Decepticons capture all the children to use as hostages in exchange for the Autobots's minicons. Fred and Billy are officially introduced to the Autobots.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Underground
programme.desc: The latest minicon re-activates in the subway system of a large city, and there's the usual scramble to see which side can get to it first. And a new transformer makes himself known - but which side is he on?

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Ruin
programme.desc: From an ancient submerged city a beautiful girl issues a warning about the devastating power - and danger - of three special, combining minicons. The Autobots already have two of them: now Megatron aims to capture the third.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Prehistory
programme.desc: The children learn more about the history of the minicons and the war. The latest minicon alert leads the team to a volcanic island: the volcano erupts in the middle of the usual 'Bot vs 'Con battle.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Swoop
programme.desc: he Decepticons gain access to the Autobot base, and attempt to take the other two minicons that, with the one Megatron captured on the island, combine to make the supremely powerful Star Sabre. Can Hot Shot save the day?

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Overmatch
programme.desc: Hot Shot proves himself very skilled with the Star Sabre, but the arrival of a new Decepticon proves him overconfident. The Decepticons acquire the first of another three combining minicons which transform into the ultimate form of defence.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Gale
programme.desc: A new minicon activates inside a highway tunnel, and the race is on to see who reach it first. Hot Shot is becoming more proficient with the Star Sabre. A new transformer arrives, claiming to be an Autobot, but Rad has his doubts.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Credulous
programme.desc: Grabbing onto Megatron at the end of a battle, Hot Shot and Sideways are transported to the moon. The battle resumes, but Hot Shot is betrayed, and Starscream gains the Star Sabre.

programme.title: Survivorman: Patagonia
programme.desc: Survivorman has always been to teach the right way, the safe way, to instruct outdoor enthusiasts on when not to take chances and not go over the top, to avoid landing themselves in peril.

programme.title: Survivorman: Survivorman & Son Mongolia
programme.desc: Les returns to Mongolia after surviving a near-fatal car crash the year before with his son Logan, a recent cancer survivor.

programme.title: Survivorman: Survivorman & Son Tofino
programme.desc: Les and his 16-year-old son Logan find themselves trapped without supplies and without a way home while sea kayaking along the coastline of British Columbia.

programme.title: Survivorman: Alaska
programme.desc: As Stroud enters an ocean bay called "Taroka Arm" by sea kayak, there's only about four hours of twilight per day and he knows that Mother Nature is going to wreak havoc upon his internal clock.

programme.title: Survivorman: Kalahari
programme.desc: Les has his work cut out for him surviving in the scorching red sands of the Kalahari Desert. With only enough water for four days, Les mimics the Bushmen and sits still in the shade during daylight.

programme.title: Survivorman: Top Ten
programme.desc: Les reviews his experiences surviving in the wild. While counting down ten wilderness survival issues he has faced, he shows segments of both shows relevant to each item.

programme.title: Survivorman: Canadian Rockies
programme.desc: Les is air dropped onto a snow covered peak in the Canadian Rockies. He has with him only a few readily salvageable items, among them a broken camcorder and tripod.

programme.title: Survivorman: Nevada
programme.desc: Les simulates a trail runner becoming lost in the woods for 24 hours.

programme.title: Survivorman: Amazon
programme.desc: After brushing up on wilderness and hunting tactics from the skilled Waorani tribe, Les will have to survive on next to nothing while capturing it all with the camera equipment he lugs around.

programme.title: Survivorman: Survival Challenge
programme.desc: Les takes a group of NHL hockey players out to the wilderness to see if they have what it takes to survive.

programme.title: Survivorman: Plane Crash
programme.desc: For a week, Les will have to survive in the brutally cold and snowy wilderness with only an axe, multi-tool and a single blanket to aid him.

programme.title: Survivorman: Peru Amazonian Shamans
programme.desc: Les will participate with the Huacharia Tribe as they perform ceremony in their daily lives to pay homage to the elements.

programme.title: Survivorman: Survivorman & Son Ecuador
programme.desc: Father and son embark on a photography expedition deep in the Ecuadorian jungle but when the tour guide doesn't return, Les and Logan must put their wills of survival to the ultimate test.

programme.title: Survivorman: Mystery of Bigfoot Mountain
programme.desc: Les ventures into the most remote and dangerous grizzly bear territory of the Canadian Rockies in his search for Sasquatch. In this vast and unexplored forest, anything could be out there. Can Les capture definitive proof of Bigfoot?

programme.title: Survivorman: Survivorman & Son Wabakimi
programme.desc: Les and Logan set out for a fishing trip in a tin boat. Stranded after their motor dies, Les and Logan are quickly plunged into an intense survival situation that could happen to any summer cottager.

programme.title: Survivorman: Colorado Rockies
programme.desc: Out for a casual day's ride, Les (and horses) have to survive temperatures that vary from 70°F in the day to snow flurries at night.

programme.title: Survivorman: Where the Myth Began
programme.desc: Les tracks Bigfoot in the ancient red cedar forests of northwest California. This Sasquatch hotspot is renowned for reports of Bigfoot, and the forest is crawling with black bears. Will Les brave its dangers and catch Sasquatch on camera?

programme.title: Survivorman: Canadian Arctic
programme.desc: Les has been equipped with a bare minimum of raw materials to aid him for the next 7 days; a hunk of uncooked seal liver, some oil-rich blubber for heat, a seal hook, three matches, and a knife.

programme.title: Survivorman: Arctic Tundra
programme.desc: In the land of the midnight sun, Survivorman heads in to 72°.46 N – the northern tip of Baffin Island. On-route the boats are surrounded by a pod of orca.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: An Alabama woman discovers her husband brutally murdered in their home, but differing interpretations of the physical evidence muddle the legal case.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: A young couple are killed in what appears to be a drug deal gone wrong, but at tests reveal that the couple were clean. Can their pet dog Chief lead the police to the real culprits?

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: It started as a fairy tale: boy meets girl, they fall in love, get engaged and she falls pregnant. What if he then plots her death and tries to poison her?

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: To his neighbours, Faryion Wardrip was a good natured Sunday school teacher, but he was also a brutal serial killer, and a discarded cup brought about his capture.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: Philadelphia police were called to an abandoned car and found the female driver's dead body the following day. Unusual marks on her corpse led police to the killer.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: When a Presbyterian minister called 911, medics found his wife dying in the bathtub, having ingested large quantities of medication. Was it murder or suicide?

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: A girl on her way back from a rock concert blew a tyre on her truck. The police found the vehicle, but no trace of her. Three years later, they made a grisly discovery.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: A young dancer was elated to gain a place at the Houston High School for Performing Arts, but she fell in with a bad crowd, and suddenly disappeared without a trace.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: Phillip Rouss Jr had it all family, friends and a thriving business. Until his health began to deteriorate. Tests revealed he was being poisoned, but by whom?

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: When a six year old disappeared, her father was the prime suspect. He failed a polygraph test, and even confessed, but ten years on the investigation was turned on its head.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: The discovery of a woman's naked body, covered with bruises, leaves no doubt that she was the victim of foul play. Investigators erect a makeshift tent around the body and use Super Glue fumes to lift the killer's palm print from the victim's skin.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: When a Texas man's mail order bride disappeared, it was suspicious. When it was revealed his two previous wives both died in mysterious circumstances, it was murder.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: An elderly couple were bludgeoned to death in their home, with no suspects found. Years later, a pawn shop owner made a chance discovery that led directly to the killer.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: When a nine year old girl was taken from her home and murdered, forensic scientists uncovered a trail to a suspect who was the same man who anonymously called 911.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: The disappearance of a young woman leads police to a man with a criminal history, but with no body, there can be no arrest until they discover a charred tooth.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: A wealthy woman died suddenly, but investigators were stumped, with evidence of foul play. Until the ex-wife of the bereaved husband called to make suspicious claims.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: A rich elderly woman is murdered, her home ransacked. A trail of blood is left on the stairs. Investigators life prints, but only hunt the killer down 16 years later.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: In Miami, a sniper opened fire from the roof of a factory. When police found the gun, the serial number had been scratched off. How did they trace the killer?

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: When a serial killer was terrorising the city of St Louis, the FBI didn't need lab tests, fingerprints of any of the usual methods. All they needed was a computer.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: Using geographical profiling, investigators close in on a serial rapist, and a cleverly obtained DNA sample confirms their suspicions.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: When a mother becomes ill while travelling in an airplane, the toxic substance specialist seated next to her suspects her home might be making her and her family sick.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: The murder of a respected surgeon in a waterfront apartment community left police in St Petersburg, Florida baffled. Who would have wanted the doctor dead?

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: Bob Dorotik's body was found on a mountain road near his ranch. His wife told police that Bob had gone jogging and never returned, but investigators had their doubts.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: Sheila Bryan was convicted of killing her own mother in a car fire, and sentenced to life in prison. Uncover the story of her appeal for freedom.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: When Shari Faye Smith was abducted by her murderer, her family received a letter he'd forced her to write, entitled last will and testament. Could the police catch her killer?

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: When a Massachusetts man dropped dead of an apparent heart attack, the case pitted teams of toxicologists against each other, trying to find out if it was murder.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: When a 12 year-old was found dead in her own home, police were left clueless until a string of burglaries months later. Could a trail of stolen goods help solve a murder?

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: When 15 year-old Marlene Miller was murdered, it would take 24 years and several retrials before forensic scientists discovered the evidence to bring her killer to justice.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: A mother of two vanishes after a shopping trip. Her body is discovered a month later. Can forensic handwriting experts help detectives solve the case?

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: A woman is shot to death in her store just days before she is to testify against a robber. Can a local physics professor help police clean up CCTV footage of her killer?

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: In 1993, the state of Florida was known for more than just the sunshine. A rash of robberies on tourists would lead to a murder. Could a bite mark help to solve the case?

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: At the scene of a murder, investigators find a bite mark on the victim which leads to an arrest. Ten years later, questions are raised about the forensic technique used.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: A woman supposedly drowns in Pennsylvania and police link their investigation to a similar death in North Carolina. Can they find a suspect in a case of double murder?

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: A nurse discovers she is HIV-positive. Find out how science was able to determine her symptoms and how her contracting of the illness wasn't an accident.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: Time of death becomes pivotal after a pregnant woman is found murdered in her air-conditioned bedroom.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: When two teenage girls were attacked and their friend murdered, police were left baffled until one simple, yet rarely found, clue helped them track the footsteps of the killer.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: When a man is found shot dead in his home, his wife is a suspect. She claims she was camping with her lover, but can medical detectives use a novel technique to prove otherwise?

programme.title: Mega Builders: Tunneling Through History
programme.desc: Deep beneath the layers of bones, broken pottery and foundations of ancient mosques and early Christian churches, the final TBM is about to emerge after tunneling through the last underground station.

programme.title: Mega Transports: Superyachts
programme.desc: Transporting a ship by a ship - this becomes necessary when the super-rich want their super yacht available on the other side of the world, but do not want to sail it there themselves.

programme.title: Mega Transports: ITER Magnet
programme.desc: This giant magnet will revolutionize the world and energy production in the future. The world's largest nuclear fusion reactor is currently under construction in southern France.

programme.title: Mega Transports: Drilling Rig
programme.desc: A brand-new oil rig, worth 500 million dollar, has to go from South Korea to Europe. The problem is that it is too gigantic for a heavy transport vessel. The solution is to tow it.

programme.title: Mega Transports: Antonov
programme.desc: A giant of the skies - the Antonov AN-124-100M-150. Worldwide the biggest production cargo aircraft of all time. No aircraft can transport more goods than the Russian giant.

programme.title: Mega Transports: Gigantic Autoliner
programme.desc: A transport to the other side of the globe. The Höegh Trapper is the largest automobile transporter in the world. Two hundred meters long, thirty-six meters wide.

programme.title: Mega Transports: AutoClav
programme.desc: A unique mega transport made of steel and titanium with a special purpose: to extract tons of gold. This so-called autoclave is the biggest of its kind. Its weight: over one thousand tons.

programme.title: Mega Transports: Villagemove
programme.desc: Everyone knows it: Housemoving is a lot of work, requires excellent planning and costs time and money. Just imagine how it must be if you are moving an entire village - as a whole.

programme.title: Mega Builders: Quake-Proof Bridge
programme.desc: Six years after piles were pounded into the muddy bottom of San Francisco Bay the new Bay Bridge is about to be topped off. In March the final segment on the 525 foot tall central tower will be hoisted into place.

programme.title: Mega Builders: The Fast Track
programme.desc: In Johannesburg, South Africa, engineers are less than 2 years away from delivering South Africa's first new commuter rail line in four decades. It's called the Gautrain.

programme.title: Mega Builders: Mighty Shovel
programme.desc: With gold prices at record highs, Barrick Gold wants to sell all the gold it can. So it orders the World's Biggest Gold Mining Shovel to replace a shovel half its size at its massive open pit mine in Nevada...

programme.title: Mega Builders: Extreme Elevation
programme.desc: An international team of the best construction engineers on the planet are building the world's tallest skyscraper in the United Arab Emirate city of Dubai.

programme.title: Mega Builders: Artic Ice Crusher
programme.desc: In South Korea, a team of shipbuilders has only ten weeks to assemble the hull of the first combination oil tanker-icebreaker they've ever built.

programme.title: Mega Builders: The Big Rig
programme.desc: The Aker H6e is the biggest oil rig on the planet – built for the extreme conditions of the Barents Sea. Marine operations chief Knut Engebretsen and his team have tight deadlines for some major moves to put this monster together.

programme.title: Mega Builders: Sheikh Zayed Bridge
programme.desc: Building the Sheikh Zayed Bridge, the stunning grand gateway to the world's richest city, Abu Dhabi, capital of the United Arab Emirates, is a king size headache for Mark Jones, the engineer assembling its giant signature arches.

programme.title: Masters of Engineering
programme.desc: For centuries there have been countless and huge advances in the field of civil engineering. Thanks to the explanations of leading experts in physics, maths and other hard sciences. In this film we look at the masters of rail.

programme.title: Masters of Engineering
programme.desc: To fly... A dream that has shaped the history of humanity. A story of crazy flyers - inventors, scientists - pursuing their dream, often risking their lives doing so. Matthieu Barreau went in search of these intrepid pioneers.

programme.title: Masters of Engineering
programme.desc: 70% of the earth's surface is covered by water and much of the history of man's discovery of the earth is linked to oceans. From the fragile boats which sailed along the Mediterranean coasts to the majestic ships which sailed off to the New World.

programme.title: Wardens: Operation Camper
programme.desc: The Tongue River Reservoir State Park in south-central Montana is a popular summer destination for recreationists and fishermen, and Warden Mike Krings has his hands full keeping peace among the night crowd.

programme.title: Wardens: Operation Yellowstone
programme.desc: Wardens in Region 5 work their way up the Yellowstone River with a jet boat checking fly fishing outfitters while coming across a boat accident along the way. Then it's over to Region 1 for firearms training.

programme.title: Wardens: Operation Antelope Dummy
programme.desc: With Pronghorn antelope populations dwindling, Wardens of Region 7 run a decoy sting the day before the season begins but the real problem arises with trespassing on the opener. Then Region 4 Warden Bryan Golie has a potential poaching call.

programme.title: Wardens: Operation Cascade
programme.desc: The Upper Missouri River is a blue-ribbon trout fishery & popular rafting destination. The Cascade district in Region 4 has its share of excitement with the mysterious camper parked on private land. Then over to Region 7 for some water safety checks.

programme.title: Wardens: Operation Blackfoot
programme.desc: Region 2 wardens are responding to a Tip Mont call with multiple elk down in grizzly country. Upon arrival, one elk & the suspect are missing. In the meantime, wardens in Region 7 have shots fired during a decoy sting.

programme.title: Wardens: Operation Spotted Dog
programme.desc: When your job is protecting our most precious natural resources in some of the nation's most remote areas, there is rarely a dull moment. Wardens chronicles the lives of Conservation Officers in America.

programme.title: Wardens: Operation Boat Float
programme.desc: In the shadows of the crazy mountains, the Yellowstone River becomes a rainbow of color during the annual boat float weekend. With jet boats, the Wardens are prepared for a crazy weekend of protecting the river and assisting the crazed rafters.

programme.title: Wardens: Operation Mac Pass
programme.desc: This week our Wardens receive a Tip-Mont call about a few illegally taken elk and pursue the the suspects.

programme.title: Wardens: Operation Paddlefish
programme.desc: This week our Wardens are in Montana monitoring the rivers while people paddlefish and we also try and eliminate a pesky bear from one man's property.

programme.title: Wardens: Operation Interstate Game Check
programme.desc: This week the Wardens set up a game checkpoint to make sure everyone is following the rules.

programme.title: Wardens: Operation Chuck Coal
programme.desc: When your job is protecting our most precious natural resources in some of the nation's most remote areas, there is rarely a dull moment. Wardens chronicles the lives of Conservation Officers in America.

programme.title: Wardens: Operation Warden
programme.desc: When your job is protecting our most precious natural resources in some of the nation's most remote areas, there is rarely a dull moment. Wardens chronicles the lives of Conservation Officers in America.

programme.title: Wardens: Operation Ohv
programme.desc: Montana Game Wardens set up an operation targeting illegal off-road vehicle usage. We also follow a patrol along the Missouri River, making sure the boaters are safe and legal.

programme.title: Motorway Cops: Catching Britain's Speeders: Episode 3

programme.title: Motorway Cops: Catching Britain's Speeders: Episode 4
programme.desc: Inspector Anton Sullivan is tailing a dangerously erratic driver in a white van.

programme.title: Motorway Cops: Catching Britain's Speeders: Episode 5
programme.desc: A vehicle linked to drug dealing is on the run and evading police.

programme.title: Motorway Cops: Catching Britain's Speeders: Episode 6
programme.desc: PC Matt Turner is attempting to stop a vehicle with links to drug dealing in Macclesfield.

programme.title: Motorway Cops: Catching Britain's Speeders: Episode 7
programme.desc: PC Rich Woodward is on the hunt for a suspect that has been spotted swerving.

programme.title: British Gangsters: Faces of the Underworld: Glasgow
programme.desc: Bernard O’Mahoney begins his journey in Glasgow. Bernie meets the city’s first Godfather of crime, Walter Noval, former leader of the XYY gang, who discussed Glasgow’s underworld during the 1950s and ‘60s.

programme.title: British Gangsters: Faces of the Underworld: Manchester
programme.desc: One of Manchester's most infamous gangs was “The Quality Street Gang”. The gang was well known for sending the Krays 'packing' from Manchester when the infamous brothers tried to expand their operation Northwards.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Fragments
programme.desc: Andy’s former rookie, Duncan, is back on duty and looking to reconcile – something she’s not ready for yet. But personal feelings get thrust aside when a bomb explodes in a downtown parking garage

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Everlasting
programme.desc: The officers of 15 Division work to track down TED MCDONALD (the car-bomber from Ep. 510). But even after catching him, they realize Ted has more targets set to explode out there. The clock is ticking

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Open Windows
programme.desc: Andy is attacked by an intruder at Traci’s place and the Sex Crimes Unit steps in to take over the case their way, 15 Division will have decide whether to take matters into their own hands.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Perfect Family
programme.desc: Andy’s ideas about what makes a perfect family are put into perspective when she meets an out-of-control teen who needs to be protected from her own conservative family.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Uprising
programme.desc: A riot breaks out at a women’s correctional institute while Andy, Juliet, Nick, and Gail are there to transfer prisoners. They end up in a lock-down situation that finds Andy and Juliet trapped with a woman desperate to prove her innocence

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Letting Go
programme.desc: When Nick’s estranged older brother emerges with new information on someone from their tragic past, Nick goes off the grid to track the man down. But Juliet is hot on his heels, and Nick is forced to let her into the secrets of his past.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: A Real Gentleman
programme.desc: When Traci is a no-show for her first raid, 15 Division fears the notorious gun dealer they’re after has kidnapped her. But when Andy realizes that the serial rapist we never caught is back, it’s all hands on deck to find Traci

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Home Run
programme.desc: After a community-outreach baseball game erupts in a drive-by shooting, Gail’s relationship with her brother is put to the test . Meanwhile, Swarek plans a getaway with Andy up to Oliver’s cabin, which goes off the rails in every possible way

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Best Man
programme.desc: Andy and Sam are shocked to learn that Oliver is the prime suspect in IA’s corruption investigation into 15 Division. They only have until end of day today to find Chris Klem – the missing explosives-dealer – and clear Oliver’s name

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Integrity Test
programme.desc: With Oliver still the prime suspect in the bombing of 15’s evidence room, Andy, Dov, Gail, and Nick undertake a risky – and potentially career-ending – plan to prove that Commissioner Alonso Santana is corrupt.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Ninety Degrees
programme.desc: Andy heads out with a very-pregnant Marlo to find a volatile woman who’s gone missing after group therapy, but neither Andy nor Marlo are prepared when Marlo suddenly goes into labor.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Breaking Up the Band
programme.desc: Now that Sam and Marlo’s baby girl has arrived (Ep. 520), it’s clear nothing could have prepared Andy for this moment. So when Juliet offers Andy an opportunity to leave town for 4 months on an undercover project, Andy starts to consider it.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: 74 Epiphanies
programme.desc: Andy and Sam’s wedding comes just in time for the gang to celebrate one last hurrah. But when Andy is taken off-course by a hitchhiker and then stranded on the side of a dead-end road with a dying man, she finds herself with no way to get help

programme.title: Rookie Blue: The First Day of the Rest of Your Life
programme.desc: When a mysterious young girl vanishes from the scene of a multi-car accident, Andy McNally connects the girl to a 7-year-old cold case.
programme.sub-title: The First Day of the Rest of Your Life

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Class Dismissed
programme.desc: As local high schools wind to a close for summer, dangerous pranks abound – including the theft of an armed police car. While tracking down the stolen vehicle, Andy and Swarek pick up the trail of a volatile teen boy

programme.title: Rookie Blue: A Good Shoot
programme.desc: Dov Epstein happens upon a convenience store robbery-in-progress that results in him shooting a young black teenager.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Girl’s Night Out
programme.desc: On Traciʼs first day as a detective, all hell breaks loose when a carload of girls from a bachelorette party hits another vehicle, killing the driver. Jerry discovers that the driver of the parked car was dead before the accident.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Messy Houses
programme.desc: While answering a domestic disturbance call, Andyʼs personal life is turned inside out when the social worker on the scene turns out to be her estranged mother

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Coming Home
programme.desc: A noise complaint leads Andy and Swarek to an illegal warehouse party, and to an injured John Doe -- a homeless squatter whoʼs been stabbed in the warehouse

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Leap of Faith
programme.desc: When a gifted psychic - or, at the very least, a gifted conman - enters 15 Division to help find the missing witness in an organized-crime case, the officers are forced to come face-to-face with some of the hidden truths

programme.title: Megan Leavey
programme.desc: Young Marine Cpl. Megan Leavey starts to identify with Rex, a particularly aggressive combat dog that she trains. Together, they complete more than 100 missions until an improvised explosive device injures both, putting their fates in jeopardy.

programme.title: The Secret: Dare to Dream
programme.desc: Miranda Wells is a hardworking young widow who's struggling to raise three children on her own. She soon meets a mysterious man who reignites the family's spirit -- but he carries a secret that could also change everything.

programme.title: Ride Like a Girl
programme.desc: Michelle Payne, first female jockey to win Melbourne Cup.

programme.title: Akeelah and the Bee
programme.desc: Akeelah (Keke Palmer), an 11-year-old girl living in South Los Angeles, discovers she has a talent for spelling, which she hopes will take her to the National Spelling Bee.

programme.title: The Secret: Dare to Dream
programme.desc: Miranda Wells is a hardworking young widow who's struggling to raise three children on her own. She soon meets a mysterious man who reignites the family's spirit -- but he carries a secret that could also change everything.

programme.title: The Glass Castle
programme.desc: Based on a memoir, four children struggle to grow up in a rambling, poverty-stricken, wildly unconventional environment overseen by their dysfunctional yet uniquely loving parents.

programme.title: Megan Leavey
programme.desc: Young Marine Cpl. Megan Leavey starts to identify with Rex, a particularly aggressive combat dog that she trains. Together, they complete more than 100 missions until an improvised explosive device injures both, putting their fates in jeopardy.

programme.title: The Man with the Iron Heart
programme.desc: In 1942, the Czech resistance in London sends two young recruits to Prague to assassinate Reinhard Heydrich, the most ruthless Nazi leader who is the Reich-protector, head of the SS and the Gestapo, and the architect of the Final Solution.

programme.title: Mutant X
programme.desc: The Mutant X team embarks on a mission to locate and capture a powerful super-mutant who possesses god-like powers.

programme.title: Mutant X
programme.desc: Jesse is forced to reconnect with his former fiancée when the Mutant X team learns that her company is involved in the genetic manipulation of crops.

programme.title: Mutant X
programme.desc: A mutant who has the ability to interphase with any computer with his mind, who is paralyzed after an encounter with the team, takes over Sanctuary's computers.

programme.title: Mutant X
programme.desc: The Mutant X team learns about Lexa's estranged twin brother when he becomes the main target of an underground operation harvesting mutant organs.

programme.title: Mutant X
programme.desc: Brennan and the Mutant X team join forces with a time-traveling mutant to diffuse a bomb threatening devastating consequences.

programme.title: Mutant X
programme.desc: While Brennan and Shalimar investigate a mysterious plane crash, Lexa contemplates her future with the Mutant X team.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: The Forge of Creation
programme.desc: Lili, Vorjak, and the baby flee to find a shuttle to escape Earth. Liam and Sandoval are both tracking them - for different reasons. Augur is on the run from volunteers, but sends a friend (Juliet) to help Liam while he's gone.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: First Breath
programme.desc: A college friend of Renee's resurfaces and leads them on an investigation of the link between the Taelons and a biomedical facility's cloning operation.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: Sins of the Father
programme.desc: A Senator's daughter is found to have kryss in her system. Liam and Renee suspect the Taelons lied about synthesizing it and there is a new location for production. They believe Federov is involved. Da'an is addicted to kryss.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: Limbo
programme.desc: The Taelons lend some of their dwindling core energy to Joshua Doors for a pilot cold fusion project, but the energy is stolen, leaving the Taelons vulnerable. Jonathan Doors lives on as an AI in cyberspace.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: Motherlode
programme.desc: Augur is caught and placed in a special prison where he is placed in a sensory deprivation chamber. An amoralist gets him out and wants Augur to help him steal the gold Zo'or has on the mothership. When Liam learns of what happened he tries to find Augur.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: Take No Prisoners
programme.desc: The ANA negotiate amnesty for all resistance members, Liam tries to convince resistance member Halley Simmons to take the offer. Sandoval uses parasites to make volunteers do suicide missions against the resistance.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: The Second Wave
programme.desc: The Taelons decide to leave Earth when it appears that the Jiridians are invading. Meanwhile, a group of Resistance prisoners saved from the mother ship include several disguised Jiridians who are causing trouble for Liam and Renee.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: Essence
programme.desc: Renee's brother has PTSD. In a desperate effort to help him, she agrees to let him undergo special treatment. The treatment removes his emotion. The project is overseen by Sandoval and the emotion they take is given to Da'an.

programme.title: The Lost World: Nectar
programme.desc: To retrieve an antidote that will save professor Summerlee from deadly venom, the explorers must venture into a bee hive that no human has ever made it out of alive.

programme.title: The Lost World: Cave of Fear
programme.desc: Professor Challenger is taken hostage. To save him, the group, goes into the cave of fear to retrieve bones for a ritual offering. In the process, they revisit the dark corners of their past.

programme.title: The Lost World: Salvation
programme.desc: Summerlee saves an unconscious child from a river with CPR, which convinces the village leader they are witches. They will be burned on the stake unless they can influence the council otherwise.

programme.title: The Lost World: Blood Lust
programme.desc: Marguerite and Professor Challenger must save Roxton when he gets bit by a diseased man and transforms into a Vampire. Meanwhile, Veronica proves to two men that she doesn't belong to either of them.

programme.title: The Lost World: Out of Time
programme.desc: Marguerite, the reincarnation of the Druid's priestess, must fulfill her destiny by retrieving emeralds that will save them. Veronica has difficulty giving up a baby she has grown attached to.

programme.title: Sanctuary: Wingman
programme.desc: Will is getting ready for his big date with Abby while Henry prepares for a romantic night out with Erika. When the two meet in the hallway, they realize that they have made the same reservation for the same restaurant and the same time.

programme.title: Sanctuary: Awakening
programme.desc: During an excursion to East Africa to investigate a former Praxian stronghold, Magnus and Tesla are surprised to find a secret chamber.

programme.title: Alien from Area 51
programme.desc: Footage of a dead alien from a crashed UFO in Roswell, NM and moved to Area 51 shocked the world. The time is coming for alien intervention on Earth whether we are ready or not.

programme.title: The Witnesses: Ancient Alien Encounters
programme.desc: Contactee, sighter, and abductee share similar and different experiences with beings from other dimensions, leaving a lasting mark of their presence.

programme.title: Deep Sea Aliens
programme.desc: Explore the mysteries of the deep sea: underwater anomalies, alien abductions, USOs, and unexplained cases that defy our understanding.

programme.title: Aliens and Pyramids
programme.desc: Many pyramidal structures around the world exhibit strange glyphs of futuristic objects and signs of advanced machining with laser perfection. Was there help from an extraterrestrial source?

programme.title: Alien Contact: UFO Invaders
programme.desc: Hundreds of UFOs have crashed on Earth. Mankind has witnessed these crashes, communicated with the visitors, even left our planet with them once they are able to return to their worlds, but the most shocking revelation is the reason why they come.

programme.title: Hopkinsville: The Alien Goblins
programme.desc: A family fights off goblin-aliens in a mysterious encounter, sparking debates and investigations. Fear drives their actions.

programme.title: Ancient Alien Origins
programme.desc: Researchers discover that aliens from another world assisted in the evolution of man and were the genesis of a very real bloodline that remains intact today.

programme.title: Authentic Photographs of an Alien: The Caponi Case
programme.desc: Caponi's encounters with aliens from 1993. Real photos showcase extraterrestrial life.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries: Texas UFO
programme.desc: This episode includes: Scared to Death, Texas UFO, Butch Cassidy and Sibling Search & Update.

programme.title: Ancient Alien Question
programme.desc: Join Philip Coppens, star of the History Channel's "Ancient Aliens" series, as he provides proof that UFO's helmed by Extraterrestrials from other worlds came to Earth millennia ago.

programme.title: Aliens on the Moon: The Truth Exposed
programme.desc: Aliens On The Moon, a compelling 90-minute documentary special, goes beyond the “official” story to examine what really might have happened on the historic day that mankind first set foot on the Moon in 1969.

programme.title: Roswell: The Untold Truth
programme.desc: Major Jesse Marcel investigates strange debris found in 1947, despite being told it's a weather balloon.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens and the New World Order 2
programme.desc: Recent discoveries reveal that a highly advanced race of extraterrestrial beings came to Earth in our ancient past, but the shocking realization is that they are still here now, among us and may have a sinister agenda beyond our wildest imaginations.

programme.title: Ancient Alien America
programme.desc: Native cultures have handed down shocking accounts for generations of Aliens from other worlds visiting Earth in the ancient past and their involvement with them.

programme.title: Secrets of the Supercars
programme.desc: A visit to a secretive production facility in Sweden to look at the Koenigsegg Regera, a Swedish supercar. Titch Cormack lifts the lid on the world's first supercar, the Jaguar XK120.

programme.title: Secrets of the Supercars
programme.desc: Take a behind-the-scenes tour of Bugatti's production facility in Molsheim. Plus, Titch Cormack uncovers a luxury car from the 1920s: the Rolls Royce Silver Ghost.

programme.title: Secrets of the Supercars
programme.desc: A grand tour of the Ferrari Roma production facility in Northern Italy. Titch lifts the lid on an icon of the sixties, the series one Jaguar E-type.

programme.title: Secrets of the Supercars
programme.desc: The armoured BMW X5 is the perfect hybrid of when armoured cars meet supercars. Titch Cormack reveals just what it takes to design and build a car that can come under enemy attack.

programme.title: Secrets of the Supercars
programme.desc: A visit to the Croatian production facility of the Rimac C Two. Titch Cormack hits the jackpot when he discovers a barn full of a game-changing technically advanced Aston Martin Lagonda's.

programme.title: Secrets of the Supercars
programme.desc: It's all about feeling the wind in your hair as the lid is lifted on the Pagani Huayra Roadster BC. Take a look behind the scenes at the production facility in Northern Italy with founder and Chief Designer Horacio Pagani.

programme.title: Secrets of the Supercars
programme.desc: Explores a variety of off-road vehicles, including the modern Land Rover Defender. In addition, Titch Cormack travels to Cornwall to uncover the story behind the Second World War's Willys Jeep.

programme.title: Forbidden History
programme.desc: Jamie Theakston looks into the contentious theory that Jesus was married with children and his bloodline lives on today.

programme.title: Forbidden History
programme.desc: Did giants once inhabit the Earth? Jamie Theakston travels to Sardinia to investigate reports of enormous skeletons being found in a network of caves.

programme.title: Forbidden History
programme.desc: Jamie investigates the High Priests of the Temple in Jerusalem and how they hid sacred items from the Romans. He also looks at whether the Dead Sea Scrolls reveal the location of hidden wonders.

programme.desc: The magic and mystery of alchemy is revealed as Jamie Theakston meets a `potion maker' and hears about London's alchemic roots from author Joy Hancox.

programme.title: Eddie Eats America
programme.desc: Strongman Eddie meets and eats gators roaming the Everglades, tests his grappling skills with WWE legends The Headbangers, and tries to devour a kitchen sink full of ice-cream.

programme.title: Eddie Eats America
programme.desc: Eddie visits the Garden State for a supersized breakfast in a New Jersey diner, a tryout with ice hockey pros the NJ Devils and a struggle with an eight-hot-dog challenge.

programme.title: Eddie Eats America
programme.desc: In Austin, Eddie Hall takes on Superbike legend Colin `Texas Tornado' Edwards in a strength vs speed race - and sets his own eating challenge from eight of the city's food trucks.

programme.title: Eddie Eats America
programme.desc: In Manhattan, Eddie Hall goes head to head with long-time rival Brian Shaw, pulling a 23-tonne truck - and attempting the notorious skyscraper `Monster sandwich' from Sarge's Deli.

programme.title: Eddie Eats America
programme.desc: Eddie Hall visits Fort Worth, Texas, where he takes on a monster pancake challenge, a painful rodeo test, and local delicacy - calves' testes.

programme.title: Eddie Eats America
programme.desc: Eddie hits San Antonio to sample the finest Tex-Mex food and a gigantic chicken fried steak with no chicken. He also tests whether he has the moves for TV show `Ninja Warrior'.

programme.title: Eddie Eats America
programme.desc: Eddie gets a taste of Cuba in Miami's fresh seafood, sets his sights at a shooting range, and heads cross-state to attempt a huge surf and turf challenge created just for him.

programme.title: Eddie Eats America
programme.desc: Stoke strongman Eddie Hall visits cosmopolitan Queens, NY, to make a solo attempt at a huge Greek kebab banquet, sample the best Chinese dumplings and try his hand at baseball.

programme.title: Eddie Eats Christmas
programme.desc: Eddie's in Bradford to challenge a 4kg naan bread that's accompanied by turkey curry, and he tries out his throwing arm against a local strongman.

programme.title: Eddie Eats Christmas
programme.desc: Eddie's in the Midlands to take on one of his biggest challenges to date when he goes up against the 12 courses of Polish Christmas.

programme.title: Eddie Eats America
programme.desc: Eddie Hall lands in Florida Keys to attempt a conch-fritter eating record, do some serious big-game fishing and try what's billed as the best Key Lime Pie on earth.

programme.title: Eddie Eats America
programme.desc: Eddie squares up to the fearsome Mac & Cheese Challenge at Brooklyn's Mac Shack, which weighs in at more than two kilograms and nearly 7,000 calories of pasta, cheese and sauce.

programme.title: Eddie Eats America
programme.desc: In Houston, Eddie faces the grim reaper in a crawfish challenge featuring the fearsome reaper pepper. He also devours some southern comfort food and pulls a plane down a runway.

programme.title: Mel Giedroyc: Unforgivable
programme.desc: Mel and Lou are joined by Graham Norton, Desiree Burch and Alex Brooker. Graham reveals a lie to his mother that went too far, and Alex talks about trying to catch a girl in a trap.

programme.title: Yo! MTV Raps Classic: Dr. Dre/Snoop Dogg
programme.desc: Fab 5 Freddy is in LA visiting Dr. Dre's pool party. He interviews Dr. Dre and Snoop Dogg about their music, Death Row Records, and their upcoming projects

programme.desc: Fab 5 Freddy interviews Supercat about the dancehall genre and moving to America from Jamaica

programme.desc: Fab 5 Freddy interviews Wu-Tang Clan about their origins, style, and music on the set of their new music video

programme.title: Yo! MTV Raps Classic: 3 Times Dope
programme.desc: Fab 5 Freddy visits iconic spots in Philly with3 Times Dope, and several other local rappers meet up with them

programme.title: Yo! MTV Raps Classic: The Last Show
programme.desc: The hosts interview various rap artists and groups about what the show has meant for them, and flashback to memorable moments throughout the show. Several artists perform live.

programme.title: Yo! MTV Raps Classic: Mel Gibson
programme.desc: Mel Gibson visits the set, and Blak Panta discusses his career and demonstrates his signature dance

programme.title: Yo! MTV Raps Classic: Sir Mix-a-Lot

programme.title: Yo! MTV Raps Classic: Eddie Murphy

programme.title: Yo! MTV Raps Classic: Nas

programme.title: Yo! MTV Raps Classic: Lady of Rage

programme.title: Yo! MTV Raps Classic: Ice Cube
programme.desc: Fab 5 Freddy visits Hollywood Blvd. and interviews Ice Cube about his music, leaving N.W.A., and upcoming projects

programme.title: Yo! MTV Raps Classic: Naughty By Nature
programme.desc: Ed Lover and Doctor Dré hang out on set with Naughty By Nature who perform their song "O.P.P." live

programme.title: Yo! MTV Raps Classic: Mary J Blige
